name: Swing Evolutions
about: Swing Evolutions is a year-round indoor golf training and entertainment center in Reading, PA, featuring a variety of simulator bays with advanced launch monitor technology. The facility offers 7 regular bays powered by Foresight GC2 launch monitors, 2 advanced bays with Uneekor Eye Minis, and 2 premium bays equipped with Uneekor EYEXO2 technology. It provides a casual, relaxed atmosphere for golfers to improve their game or enjoy simulated play on thousands of virtual courses. Pricing is structured on a per-bay-hour basis with options for regular, advanced, and premium bays, catering to both individual players and groups.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading launch monitor technology for accurate shot analytics
Variety of bay options to fit different skill levels and budgets
Friendly atmosphere with a focus on both improvement and entertainment
Option to play as a group with support for up to 8 golfers per bay
Comprehensive instruction services available from certified professionals

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service available.
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: 7 regular bays equipped with this photometric camera launch monitor
2 premium bays with this advanced launch monitor featuring Club Optix

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, the simulators involve swinging real golf clubs with real golf balls.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify policies regarding outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to complete 18 holes.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically mention child-friendly features, but it does offer instruction for 'golfers of all ages' and does not list any age restrictions, making it likely suitable for juniors.
